summary: Iteration 50 - Full customer order flow tested successfully. Fixed critical backend bug where orders API was failing due to missing default values in OrderResponse model. Also fixed tenant_id resolution issue where customer orders were using menu_slug instead of actual tenant UUID.
passed_tests: Frontend: /menu page displays available restaurants - PASSED
Frontend: Restaurant card shows 'Full Flow Test Restaurant' with 4 branches - PASSED
Frontend: Clicking restaurant navigates to /menu/demo-maestro - PASSED
Frontend: Branch selection page shows 2 branches (Aljadreia, Alsaydaia) - PASSED
Frontend: Selecting branch shows menu with categories and products - PASSED
Frontend: Categories displayed: الكل, المشروبات, الوجبات الرئيسية, المقبلات, الحلويات - PASSED
Frontend: Products displayed: قهوة عربية (3,500 د.ع), شاي (2,500 د.ع) - PASSED
Frontend: Add to cart button works - toast shows 'تمت الإضافة للسلة' - PASSED
Frontend: Cart button shows item count and total - PASSED
Frontend: Cart page shows items with quantity controls - PASSED
Frontend: Checkout page shows customer info form - PASSED
Frontend: Checkout page shows delivery address form with map option - PASSED
Frontend: Checkout page shows payment methods (نقداً, بطاقة, زين كاش) - PASSED
Frontend: Order submission works - shows tracking page with order #2080003 - PASSED
Frontend: Order tracking shows status timeline - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/customer/order/{tenant_id} creates order successfully - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/orders returns all orders including customer orders - PASSED (after fix)

Frontend: Order #2080003 shows customer 'زبون اختبار' - PASSED

Frontend: Kitchen Display shows order items and 'جاهز للتسليم' button - PASSED

bugs_fixed_during_testing.root_cause: OrderResponse model in server.py had required fields (discount, tax, payment_status) without default values. Old orders in database didn't have these fields.
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added default values to OrderResponse model: discount=0.0, tax=0.0, payment_status='pending', branch_id=Optional, created_at=Optional

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Customer orders not appearing in restaurant's Orders page
bugs_fixed_during_testing.root_cause: Customer order endpoint was storing menu_slug (demo-maestro) as tenant_id instead of actual tenant UUID
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added tenant resolution logic to resolve menu_slug to actual tenant_id before creating order

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Existing customer orders had wrong tenant_id
bugs_fixed_during_testing.root_cause: Orders created before fix had tenant_id='demo-maestro'
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Updated 3 orders in database to use correct tenant_id='82092f09-0381-4879-a90b-31dab76cce97'

updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed OrderResponse model defaults and tenant_id resolution
seed_data_creation: Created test order #2080003 with customer 'زبون اختبار' during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full customer order flow is working: /menu → select restaurant → select branch → view menu → add to cart → checkout → order appears in restaurant's Orders and Kitchen Display. Test credentials: demo@maestroegp.com / demo123. Customer menu URL: /menu/demo-maestro. Fixed backend issues with OrderResponse model and tenant_id resolution.
notes: تدفق طلب العميل الكامل يعمل بشكل صحيح: صفحة /menu → اختيار المطعم → اختيار الفرع → عرض القائمة → إضافة للسلة → إتمام الطلب → ظهور الطلب في صفحة الطلبات وشاشة المطبخ
